objectives.description: Find the hidden Sinkmouth Cut east of Fencebreaker Camp.
Push as far as the goblins' Feast Hall beneath the ridge.

below_the_fencebreakers.summary: Follow the goblin retreat east of Ruk's old camp and confirm where the road-cutters have really been nesting.
below_the_fencebreakers.title: Below the Fencebreakers

objectives.description: Take the south trail from Fencebreaker Camp into Blackfen.
Reach Boglight Hollow where the fen lamps start burning wrong.

bogwater_rumors.summary: Follow the bad trail south of the old goblin camp and confirm what has been moving through the Blackfen edge beyond the road country.
bogwater_rumors.title: Bogwater Rumors

objectives.description: Reach the Relay Trench beyond the first salvage drifts.
Recover a live Flux Coil from Junk-Yard salvage machines.

bridgework_for_joss.summary: Help Joss steady the Junk-Yard bridge by reaching the relay trench and bringing back a live flux coil.
bridgework_for_joss.title: Bridgework for Joss

objectives.description: Reach Blackreed's Roost at the top of the tower.
Defeat Captain Varn Blackreed.

captain_varn_blackreed.summary: Climb to the broken crown of the tower and bring down the bandit captain before he turns the ridge into a permanent noose over Brambleford's road.
captain_varn_blackreed.title: Captain Varn Blackreed

objectives.description: Reach the Barrow Circle deeper in the field.
Defeat 4 undead in Old Barrow Field.

do_not_disturb_the_dead.summary: Push into Old Barrow Field and cut down the first dead things that have started walking there.
do_not_disturb_the_dead.title: Do Not Disturb the Dead

fencebreakers.next_step: Push through to Fencebreaker Camp and bring down Ruk the Fence-Cutter.

objectives.description: Defeat 2 goblin raiders on Goblin Road.

fencebreakers.summary: Drive off the goblin raiders cutting apart roadside fences before the farmers lose what little they have left.
fencebreakers.title: Fencebreakers

objectives.description: Find the Anchor Pit at the heart of the salvage field.
Defeat Foreman Coilback.

foreman_coilback.summary: Descend into the Anchor Pit and destroy the salvage foreman that keeps the Junk-Yard bridge violent and unstable.
foreman_coilback.title: Foreman Coilback

objectives.description: Find Greymaw's Hollow beneath the split oak.
Defeat Old Greymaw.

greymaws_trail.summary: Track the scarred wolf haunting the deep trail and break its hold on the woods.
greymaws_trail.title: Greymaw's Trail

objectives.description: Reach the Sludge Run deeper in the warrens.
Defeat 6 warrens enemies beneath the ridge.

gutters_and_hexes.summary: Thin the warrens before the goblins can spill back onto the road with hexers, cave bats, and tunnel brutes in tow.
gutters_and_hexes.title: Gutters and Hexes

objectives.description: Gather 3 Moonleaf Sprigs in Whispering Woods.

herbs_for_sister_maybelle.summary: Gather enough moonleaf from the whispering glades to keep Brambleford supplied with poultices.
herbs_for_sister_maybelle.title: Herbs for Sister Maybelle

objectives.description: Report to Mayor Elric Thorne in Mayor's Hall.
Speak with Brother Alden at the Chapel of the Dawn Bell.
Inspect the Old Barrow causeway beyond the woods.

lanterns_at_dusk.summary: Meet with the mayor and the chapel, then inspect the barrow causeway where the town's western lanterns have started going out.
lanterns_at_dusk.title: Lanterns at Dusk

objectives.description: Reach Carrion Rise at the far side of the fen track.
Defeat 6 Blackfen threats in the marsh approaches.

lights_in_the_reeds.summary: Push deeper into Blackfen, chart the crow rise, and cut down enough marsh-born threats that the trail stops feeling claimed.
lights_in_the_reeds.title: Lights in the Reeds

locks_under_blackwater.next_step: Climb to the Blackwater Lamp House and put down the thing wearing the south light.

objectives.description: Reach the Sluice Walk above the drowned lock run.
Reach the Sunken Lock at the far side of the drowned works.
Defeat 5 Drowned Weir threats beyond the wallow.

locks_under_blackwater.summary: Push deeper into the drowned works, reach the inner lock line, and tear through enough of the blackwater ward to expose whatever is still keeping the old lamp burning wrong.
locks_under_blackwater.title: Locks Under Blackwater

objectives.description: Reach Archer's Ledge beside the tower yard.
Defeat 5 bandits at the Ruined Watchtower.

loose_arrows.summary: Break the tower's forward line, clear the ledge, and thin the bandits before they can lock the climb down completely.
loose_arrows.title: Loose Arrows

miretooths_claim.next_step: Return to Brambleford and speak with Joss Veller at the observatory about the wrong south light beyond the wallow.

objectives.description: Reach Miretooth's Wallow beyond the far reeds.
Defeat Miretooth.

miretooths_claim.summary: Find the predator ruling the Blackfen edge and bring down Miretooth before whatever follows it decides Brambleford is simply the next shoreline.
miretooths_claim.title: Miretooth's Claim

practice_makes_heroes.next_step: Go south to Town Green, then west to the inn and speak with Uncle Pib Underbough.

objectives.description: Visit Captain Harl Rowan at the Training Yard.

practice_makes_heroes.summary: Report to the training yard and get your bearings before leaving town.
practice_makes_heroes.title: Practice Makes Heroes

rats_in_the_kettle.next_step: Go east to the East Gate and speak with Mira Fenleaf about the road.

objectives.description: Head down into the Rat and Kettle Cellar beneath the inn.
Defeat 3 thorn rats in or around Brambleford.

rats_in_the_kettle.summary: Drive the thorn rats out of the inn cellar before they chew through another week of supplies.
rats_in_the_kettle.title: Rats in the Kettle

roadside_howls.next_step: Thin the goblin cutters still working along Goblin Road.

objectives.description: Check in at the East Gate.
Reach the Old Fence Line on Goblin Road.
Push as far as Wolf Turn and see how dangerous the road has become.

roadside_howls.summary: Scout the eastern road where wolves and goblins have been causing trouble.
roadside_howls.title: Roadside Howls

ruk_the_fence_cutter.next_step: After Ruk falls, check in with Mira, Sister Maybelle, or Joss to choose the next branch.

objectives.description: Find the Fencebreaker Camp beyond Wolf Turn.
Defeat Ruk the Fence-Cutter.

ruk_the_fence_cutter.summary: Track down the goblin brute leading the fence raiders and break his hold on Goblin Road.
ruk_the_fence_cutter.title: Ruk the Fence-Cutter

objectives.description: Reach the Crane Grave deeper in Junk-Yard Planet.
Recover an Anchor Glass Shard from the relay swarm.

signal_in_the_scrap.summary: Push deeper into the scrapfield, chart the crane grave, and recover a shard of anchor glass for the observatory lens.
signal_in_the_scrap.title: Signal in the Scrap

objectives.description: Reach the Watchtower Approach beyond Fencebreaker Camp.
Push into the ruined outer yard and confirm the tower is occupied.

smoke_on_the_ridge.summary: Push beyond the old goblin camp and confirm whether the ruined border tower has fallen fully into bandit hands.
smoke_on_the_ridge.title: Smoke on the Ridge

the_hollow_lantern.next_step: Return to Joss, Mayor Elric, or the Trophy Hall and take the win for what it is: the end of Brambleford's first hard chapter.

objectives.description: Reach the Blackwater Lamp House beyond the drowned lock line.
Defeat the Hollow Lantern.

the_hollow_lantern.summary: Reach the drowned lamp house at the edge of Blackfen and extinguish the thing inside it before the wrong south light grows into the town's next standing problem.
the_hollow_lantern.title: The Hollow Lantern

objectives.description: Find the Sunken Dais at the heart of Old Barrow Field.
Defeat Sir Edric the Restless.

the_knight_without_rest.summary: Find the fallen knight haunting the deepest barrow and lay Sir Edric to rest.
the_knight_without_rest.title: The Knight Without Rest

objectives.description: Reach the Pot-King's Court at the heart of the warrens.
Defeat Grubnak the Pot-King.

the_pot_kings_feast.summary: Reach the goblin feast court and bring down Grubnak before his warrens become the next thing chewing at Brambleford's road.
the_pot_kings_feast.title: The Pot-King's Feast

the_south_light.next_step: Push through the Sluice Walk and the Sunken Lock, then break the blackwater line before it decides Brambleford belongs on its route.

objectives.description: Cross into the Drowned Causeway beyond Miretooth's Wallow.
Reach Lantern Weir where the wrong south light starts burning in earnest.

the_south_light.summary: Follow the wrong marsh light beyond Miretooth's Wallow and confirm whether an old drowned lamp line is still feeding whatever has started answering from the fen edge.
the_south_light.title: The South Light

objectives.description: Enter Whispering Woods by the old trail.
Reach the Briar Glade deeper in the woods.

what_whispers_in_the_wood.summary: Scout the first reaches of Whispering Woods and find where the old unease is thickest.
what_whispers_in_the_wood.title: What Whispers in the Wood
